sections.paragraph:
a root unused in Kal.-

(1) properly to breathe (see with regard to this power in the syllable הב, אב, או under the roots אָהַב, אָוָה, הָבַל), comp. Piel. Hence-

(2) to live, i.q. חָיָה, compare the noun חַוָּה.

Piel חִוָּה prop. to breathe out, hence to declare, to shew, a word used in poetry instead of the prosaic הִגִּיד (Chald. and Syr. חַיִּיִ, ܚܰܘܺܝ, Arabic transp. وحى, like צִוָּה Arab. وصى). Job 32:10, 17 Job 32:17. Constr. followed by a dative of pers., Psa 19:3 more often an acc., Job 32:6, with suff. 15:17 36:2 . Derivatives אַחְוָה [חַוָּה, חִוִּי, יְחַוְאֵל].
